HomePage.title: Marketorix
HomePage.description: Stop experimenting. Start scaling. Marketorix fixes, secures, and deploys enterprise-grade AI. We transform broken AI apps and scattered data into secure, autonomous workflows that drive real ROI.

autonomous_agents.title: Multi-Agent Workflows
autonomous_agents.description: Move beyond simple prompts. We deploy autonomous, multi-agent systems that don't just answer questions—they execute complex, multi-step tasks across your ERP, CRM, and internal APIs without human intervention.

strategy.title: AI Strategy & FinOps
strategy.description: Stop wasting budget on bloated API calls. We audit your AI readiness, optimize your architecture for cost-efficiency (AI FinOps), and build a strategic roadmap that guarantees measurable ROI and compliance with upcoming AI regulations.

custom_solutions.title: RAG & Custom AI Solutions
custom_solutions.description: We build highly secure, custom AI architectures using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). By grounding advanced language models in your proprietary data, we eliminate hallucinations and deliver absolute accuracy.

integration.title: Enterprise Data & Integration
integration.description: AI is only as good as your data. We engineer robust data pipelines, implement vector databases, and seamlessly integrate local or cloud-based AI models into your legacy systems to securely power your modern operations.

support.title: Model Monitoring & Support
support.description: AI requires continuous calibration. We provide 24/7 monitoring to detect model drift, optimize prompt efficiency, and ensure your AI systems remain secure, accurate, and aligned with your evolving business goals.

industry_specific.title: Industry-Specific AI
industry_specific.description: Generic models don't solve niche problems. We fine-tune Open-Source and proprietary models to master the specific compliance, terminology, and operational requirements of healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and retail.

nl_to_sql.title: Conversational BI
nl_to_sql.description: Democratize your data. We build secure interfaces that allow your executive and operational teams to bypass complex dashboards and extract real-time insights, charts, and metrics using natural, conversational language.

chatbots.title: Action-Driven AI Copilots
chatbots.description: Basic chatbots are dead. We engineer intelligent AI Copilots that sit alongside your employees and customers. They understand deep context, trigger real-world actions, and resolve complex support tickets end-to-end.

code_review.title: AI-Generated Code Audit & Security
code_review.description: Developers are using AI to code faster, but injecting complex vulnerabilities. We audit, debug, and secure AI-generated code to protect your enterprise.
features: Code optimization and technical debt reduction

recovery.title: AI App Recovery & Scaling
recovery.description: Did your initial AI project fail to scale or suffer from massive API costs? We are the experts who step in to fix, rebuild, and optimize underperforming AI applications.
features: API cost optimization and model routing (FinOps)

autonomous_dev.title: Autonomous Agent Engineering
autonomous_dev.description: We build digital workers. Our multi-agent frameworks handle repetitive, high-logic workflows 24/7, dramatically reducing your operational overhead.

chatbot_dev.title: Action-Driven Copilot Development
chatbot_dev.description: Upgrade from FAQ bots to capable Copilots. We build conversational agents that actually perform tasks, process transactions, and resolve issues.

integration.title: Data Pipeline & Legacy Integration
integration.description: We bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI and your existing legacy systems, ensuring your proprietary data is securely prepared for machine learning.

strategy.title: AI Governance & Strategy
strategy.description: Navigate the complexities of AI adoption. We deliver actionable roadmaps focused on security, legal compliance, and tangible financial returns.
features: AI TRiSM (Trust, Risk, and Security Management)
EU AI Act & Data Privacy compliance

custom_dev.title: Custom RAG & LLM Development
custom_dev.description: Stop relying on generic models. We fine-tune and build highly specialized architectures designed specifically around your proprietary knowledge base.

support.title: Continuous AI FinOps & Support
support.description: AI isn't set-and-forget. We actively manage your deployments to prevent performance degradation and keep your cloud computing costs highly optimized.
features: Token usage tracking and cost reduction

industry_apps.title: Industry-Specific AI Engineering
industry_apps.description: Deploy AI solutions that speak your industry's language, respecting the strict compliance and operational nuances of your specific sector.

nl_to_sql.title: Conversational Business Intelligence
nl_to_sql.description: Turn your databases into conversational partners. Allow leadership to extract complex data insights instantly by asking simple questions.
features: High-accuracy Natural Language to SQL translation

robert.name: Robert Zimerman
robert.bio: With over a decade bridging the gap between enterprise software and AI, Robert specializes in translating complex machine learning capabilities into scalable, high-ROI business solutions.

lars.name: Lars Nyberg
lars.bio: Lars is an expert in advanced NLP, RAG architectures, and AI security. He leads our engineering teams to build robust, hallucination-free AI systems for enterprise clients.

devTeam.title: Global Engineering Talent
devTeam.description: Beyond our core leadership, Marketorix commands a curated, global network of elite AI engineers, data scientists, and prompt architects. We scale our dedicated teams to match the exact technical requirements of your enterprise projects.

form.name: Name
form.message: Tell us about your AI challenges or goals
form.success: Your request has been received. An AI strategist will contact you shortly.
form.error: Transmission failed. Please try again or email us directly.

Metadata.title: Marketorix | Enterprise AI Engineering & Integration
Metadata.description: Marketorix fixes, secures, and scales enterprise AI. We specialize in RAG architectures, AI code audits, autonomous agents, and AI cost optimization.

blog.title: Insights | Marketorix
blog.description: Expert perspectives on AI integration, LLM security, and scaling enterprise tech.

CTA.title: Ready to move your AI from prototype to production?
